description.value: Price 13,801 gp; Slot none; CL 12th; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura moderate evocation DESCRIPTION Unless this +2 corrosive whip is damaged by fire, it regenerates hit points at a rate of 1 hit point per minute. In performance combat, the wielder of a greenblood scourge can spend a victory point as a swift action to give the weapon the corrosive burst special ability. Also, the wielder no longer needs to attempt a performance combat check when using the withdraw action during performance combat, as the weapon’s blasts of acid prevent the enemy from approaching. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 7,051 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells acid arrow, adoration
